scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean:all && NEXT_DISABLE_WEBPACK_CACHE=1 next dev
scripts.build: npm run test:chat-p0 && npm run build:app
scripts.preview:stable: npm run build && npm run start -- --port 3300
scripts.test:chat-p0: CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-resto-sud-100.ts && CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-autoimpiego-100.ts && CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-smartstart-numeric.ts && CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-precision-guards.ts && CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-ateco-guard.ts && CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-temporal-guard.ts && CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-business-state.ts && CHAT_NO_OPENAI_TOKENS=true npx tsx scripts/test-chat-capabilities-meta.ts && npm run chat:model-routing && npm run chat:context-lock && npm run test:chat-runtime-safety && npm run test:chat-production-regressions
scripts.test:regression-lock: npm run test:phase-a && npm run test:phase-b && npm run test:phase-c && npm run test:practice-flow && npm run chat:model-routing && npm run chat:web-grounding && npm run test:ingestion-contract && npm run test:scan-parity
scripts.benchmark:chat:gate: BNDO_BENCHMARK_CASESET=extended BNDO_BENCHMARK_BASELINE_MODEL=gpt-4.1 BNDO_BENCHMARK_GATE=true BNDO_BENCHMARK_MIN_AVG=0.985 BNDO_BENCHMARK_MIN_PASS=0.95 BNDO_BENCHMARK_MIN_DELTA_AVG=0 BNDO_BENCHMARK_MIN_DELTA_PASS=0 BNDO_BENCHMARK_REQUIRE_NO_CRITICAL=true npx tsx scripts/benchmark-chat-bndo-vs-gpt.ts
scripts.benchmark:chat:adversarial: BNDO_ADV_MAX_CASES=1200 BNDO_ADV_CONCURRENCY=1 BNDO_ADV_RETRIES=2 BNDO_ADV_RETRY_BACKOFF_MS=2500 BNDO_ADV_RATELIMIT_COOLDOWN_MS=12000 npx tsx scripts/benchmark-chat-adversarial-multiturn.ts
scripts.benchmark:chat:adversarial:gate: BNDO_ADV_MAX_CASES=1200 BNDO_ADV_CONCURRENCY=1 BNDO_ADV_RETRIES=2 BNDO_ADV_RETRY_BACKOFF_MS=2500 BNDO_ADV_RATELIMIT_COOLDOWN_MS=12000 BNDO_ADV_GATE=true BNDO_ADV_MIN_PASS_RATE=0.95 BNDO_ADV_MIN_AVG_SCORE=0.985 BNDO_ADV_REQUIRE_NO_CRITICAL=true npx tsx scripts/benchmark-chat-adversarial-multiturn.ts
scripts.test:chat-critical-gate: npm run test:chat-p0 && npm run benchmark:chat:gate && npm run benchmark:chat:adversarial:gate
scripts.eval:all: npm run eval:mass-unit && npm run test:phase-a && npm run test:phase-b && npm run test:phase-c
scripts.deploy:preview:safe: npm run test:chat-critical-gate && npx netlify deploy --build --json
scripts.deploy:live:safe: npm run test:chat-critical-gate && npx netlify deploy --build --prod --json
